title: Robust Kenyan Rice Vermicelli Noodles
description: A winey and crunchy Kenyan dish featuring rice vermicelli, dashi extract, and ayurvedic sattvic friendly ingredients, perfect for a sick day. This dish is made with wholesome ingredients to help soothe and nourish the body.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the dashi extract, turmeric, and salt, and stir to combine.
Add the rice vermicelli to the pan and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until the noodles are heated through and starting to brown.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
